name: parity_safe_sliding_cooperative_attention
implementation: separately compile qk-native decode shader with G4_COOPMAT_F32=1; F32 cooperative QK; shared active-split scores; scalar-compatible 256-lane F32 max/sum tree; chronological f16-probability/F32-accumulator cooperative PV; retain scalar decode attention for layers 0-2

name: post_attention_norm_fusion
implementation: one qk-native dispatch reproduces weighted post-attention RMS, materializes the residual add, performs one shared RMS reduction, and emits both independently weighted shared/routed inputs

name: early_layer_f32_coopmat
disposition: only the all-three-layer experiment remains available behind an explicit parity-failing env flag

name: tied_q6k_head_blocks_per_row_specialization
disposition: reverted; no assembled win despite the Stage 1 standalone bandwidth result

name: neutral_coopmat_reduction_level_elision
implementation: start F32 max/sum trees at the first stride below activeCount, omitting only levels whose upper half is entirely NEG_MAX or zero

method: phase 1 runs QK; phase 2 runs QK plus softmax/reduction; the normal module runs QK plus softmax/reduction plus PV; reported phases are cumulative timestamp deltas
note: profiling dispatches three variants and therefore inflates total attention wall time; component medians, not the tripled total, are the result
